message:
fix(cdp): route events through nav_ws, fix memory leaks

- Move Runtime.enable from pipe to nav_ws WebSocket
- Pipe now only handles screencast frames (rendering)
- Events (console, dialogs, file chooser) come from nav_ws
- Fix memory leaks: free sendCommand results in viewer.zig
- Fix thread cleanup: join threads instead of detaching
- Add debug logging to fs_polyfill.js for directory enumeration
